docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,257.14 FILED BY THOMAS, HARLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCE, YVONNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, HARLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCE, YVONNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCE, YVONNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---GEORGE AIUERGUE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2015 - BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT ON FRIDAY, JAN-02-2015. MATTER ORDERED CONTINUED AT REQUEST OF PARTIES FOR SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER TO JAN-16-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN S. PRICKETT; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, HARLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPENCE, YVONNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
